channel.title: Group buys & ICs · keyboard newswire
channel.description: Live group buys and interest checks from Geekhack and partner vendors.

item.title: [IC] GMK Spark - GB Dates, Pricing, Kitting Updated!
item.description: GB May 22 to June 21 I would like to present: Spark GMK Spark delivers a burst of energy and nostalgia through electric color, playful accents, and a shockingly familiar identity. Designed for flexibility, Spark can shift between two distinct looks. Go bold with accent-driven configurations that bring out its personality, or keep it clean with a balanced approach that pairs vibrant alphas with deeper modifier keys for a timeless, everyday setup. UPDATE May 6 Removed Alphas Kit, not enough demand. Trimmed some custom keys to reduce cost. Base now includes 6-key 40’s keys. Base now includes both — 16556 pts · 26 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Vintage Motorsport- Group Buy June 12- July 6
item.description: Glare 65 by Geon works. This set is inspired by the famous Gulf Livery, shown below. This set is designed to be an "R2" to my previous set, SA Motorsport Selectric. Based on a multitude of requests to do this in a cylindrical profile, I am doing it in DCS, using stock Signature Plastic Colors. It is important to note that the blue and orange for the Gulf livery weren't consistent. The blue went between a powder blue, "workshirt" blue, and a seafoam green in some incarnations of the livery. The orange is between a more "marigold" (Yellow Orange) and a more "vermillion" (Red Orange), depending o — 3714 pts · 8 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] OF Studio  OF1 60% Keyboard Kit
item.description: OF Studio - OF1 60% Keyboard Hi everyone, We’re excited to share an early look at the OF1 Keyboard Kit by OF Studio. This project is entering the final stage before launch, and we’d love to gather feedback from the community. Project Overview The OF1 is a fully realized keyboard project with mass production already completed, positioning it as a low-risk group buy with a fast turnaround. Unlike traditional GBs, this is closer to a ready-to-ship model, with only final configurations remaining before launch. Keyboard Specs Specifications Layout: 60% (WKL / HHKB / WK) Typing Angle: 8° Front Heigh — 3773 pts · 4 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Orange Alert
item.description: reserved — Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] DCS Dolch [Final Update, Est GB-May]
item.description: Why? Being a huge fan of Dolch,I wanted to bring this classic colourway to life in DCS profile. IC Form || Discord || Instagram Full Album Kits Collaborations SEAL 80: DOLCH EDITION In partnership with Sensy. We made a special version of the Seal 80 aptly named the Dolch Editon . We will conduct a more detailed IC for this later once prototypes are completed. A separate GB will be conducted once everything is finalized, more information will be added soon. The purchase of a Base kit will qualify you for the purchase of the keyboard. DESKMATS Dolchmats ,in partnership with Keebpixel.:cool They — 40485 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Icon Beige
item.description: Intro Hello old Cherry lovers, this is sumjoy, I’m so glad to tell u that old style Cherry is coming. Here it is, GMK CYL Icon Beige, a set that follows the classic looking of the keycaps from Cherry G80-2100 which is my favorite Cherry keyboard. (Personally, I opened a GB two months ago, and I was bothered with finding a set of keycaps to match with it) The brown Diversity(2100 top) matched with original G80-2100 HDD keycaps. IC Form Kits Base Kit Base kit render is made based on G80-2100 HAG. Extension Kit DE Kit Macro Kit 40s Kit Note: all the icons and texts on shinethroughs, front print o — 27251 pts · 41 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] Matter 65
item.description: By Chq.works Instagram IC form ***Render*** A 65% keyboard with PC case with solid copper/brass weight as a middle piece. Hi guys, this is CHQ . I'm originally trained as an interior and furniture designer, but over the past several years, I’ve immersed myself in the world of custom mechanical keyboards. Driven by my fascination with the beauty, sound, and tactile experience of keyboards, I designed this board to reflect my personal preferences and needs. During its development, I discovered the Mechanical Keyboard Design Competition (MKDC) and decided to enter and was honored as one of the wi — 9125 pts · 9 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Blanks
item.description: GMK CYL Blanks Hello guys This set is pretty straightforward: no legends, no letters, no fonts. Just colored blank keycaps. IC Form Details Material: ABS Legends: TBC, I’ll check with GMK to see if they have blank molds for all the keys, and whether singleshot is doable. Colors: CR, L9, U9, V1, N7, V4, CV, TU2, DY, MG1 Profile: R1 R1 R2 R3 R4 R4 Kits - Please keep in mind that this is an IC, kitting may be cut or added depending on the response. Renders Amano by h40 Vero by AKB Petrichor by AKB Frog TKL by GEON Socials Discord Instagram Thanks You for reading — 9964 pts · 20 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] GMK CYL Prussian Alert | May 15th - June 12th
item.description: Over two years after the initial IC, and with the main goal of bringing the Prussian Blue colorway back to life accomplished, GMK CYL Prussian Alert is finally here! Featuring OG Icon modifiers and a custom grey/white base in place of the usual Text+Icon and beige, the set perfectly complements the Prussian Blue tone. And if you’re into Cyrillic and low-contrast aesthetics, the alternative Alpha Kit is an absolute chef’s kiss. Discord Vendors EU: Oblotzky (Lead) UK: Prototypist US: NovelKeys CA: DeskHero KR: Geonworks CN: KBDFans JP: Yushakobo OCE: SwitchKeys SEA: iLumkb IN: NeoMacro Turkiye/M — 5066 pts · 12 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] GMK Spark | May 22 - June 21
item.description: GB May 22 - June 21 It’s time to join the GB for: Spark! GMK Spark delivers a burst of energy and nostalgia through electric color, playful accents, and a shockingly familiar identity. Designed for flexibility, Spark can shift between two distinct looks. Go bold with accent-driven configurations that bring out its personality, or keep it clean with a balanced approach that pairs vibrant alphas with deeper modifier keys for a timeless, everyday setup. VENDORS United States: CannonKeys Canada: Desk Hero Europe: Eloquent Clicks United Kingdom: ProtoTypist Oceania: KeebzNCables Southeast Asia: iLu — 422 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Dino Jungle - A dinosaur themed keycap set
item.description: Howdy partners! This is the interest check for GMK CYL Dino Jungle! I’m Tristan, but you may know me as Captain Sterling. I appreciate you taking the time to check this out, and I hope you enjoy the set! Learn even more on my WEBSITE or fill out the IC FORM if you're interested in the set. Meet Dino Jungle! Dino Jungle is a dinosaur inspired set dedicated to my son. As of three years ago my son has been really into dinosaurs. We’ve decorated his room, played with tons of toys, and even been to dinosaur exhibits. I’ve been wanting to make something for him for quite a while. So when the GMK Des — 2634 pts · 7 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] RF8X | May 25th - June 8th (Minimalist housing for Realforce R1 & R2/R3S)
item.description: RF—8X Hey everyone, thanks for taking the time to take a look at this project. It's been a long time coming! GB date: May 25th 2026 – June 8th 2026 Estimated fulfillment Q4 2026 Vendors / Pricing (USD): Alu housing kit - $350 PC top + alu bottom housing kit - $360 Cipulot R1 8-9Xu PCB - $50 Plate - $40 Add-on alu top housing - $200 Add-on pc top housing - $210 Add-on alu bottom housing - $150 SEA (lead): ktechs - https://ktechs.store/products/rf-8x OCE: Toro - https://torokeeb.store/products/rf-8x-housings NA: Omnitype - https://omnitype.com/collections/rf-8x EU: Coffeekeys - https://coffeekey — 278 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] GMK Iconographic - GB Postponed, Updates to follow
item.description: INSPIRATION The inspiration for the set is the album cover for Floral Shoppe and the Iconography of ancient times that are a cornerstone of Vaporwave Aesthetics. WHERE TO BUY: North America: Mechs & Co Europe: MyKeyboard Australia & Oceania: Dailyclack South East Asia: Monokei Canada: Deskhero China: Zfrontier EN / Zfrontier CN A note on pricing: Following deciding kit pricing in November, the dollar has fallen from .85 to .81 to the euro, which effectively means a loss of 6 euros per basekit on the old pricing versus then. For this reason we were forced to increase US pricing in order to main — 97439 pts · 49 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] RF8X by keyhub - A minimalist elegant housing for the Realforce R1 & R2
item.description: Hi everyone! My name is keekeen. I’m a fellow “Topre” / rubber dome enjoyer. For me, the journey began with the HHKB, which I consider my first "end game" keyboard. Today, I am thrilled to introduce a passion project that’s been in the works: RF—8X by keyhub.design This is a custom 80% electro-capacitive keyboard housing that merges the classic design of Topre's Realforce R1 with the aesthetic legacy of the XRF by the now-defunct Noxary. The motivation of the project is deeply personal: it started as a way to support friends who were unfortunately victims of the Noxary scam, combined with my o — 23551 pts · 30 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Gambit - Now with N9 (Dolch)!
item.description: GMK CYL Gambit Play Chess! R1 1u Doubleshot ABS chess novelties keycaps — Iconic chess pieces for OG/Timeless GMK sets. Ideal for accents, XT/Macro rows, or simply just play chess with. When TBA - - - Disclaimer - - - Renders may not picture actual colors of the keycaps but if you happen to have GMK stock color in your possession then the colors are the exact match of the said colors. IC Form The Kit 16 doubleshot line-only and fill-only chess pieces, each in WoB, BoW, Beige and Dolch keycaps color and legend colors, as well as 3C and 3B beige accents color. All GMK stock colors (CR, WS1, L9, — 12600 pts · 20 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [IC] GMK CYL Dinokidz - ROARRR
item.description: Hello dino lovers, I'd like to introduce you to the already extinct, GMK CYL Dinokidz. Inspired by Dinokidz keyboard , featuring legends from Extended 2048. The idea was to bring back a bit of that old-school, playful feeling and turn it into a keycap set. Hope you guys like the set! IC Form Vendors US: Bowl Keyboards CA: EU: Delta Key Co. UK: Proto[Typist] KR: CN: KBDFans SG: iLumkb AU: Keebz N Cables Details Material: ABS Legends: Doubleshot & UV print Colors: Matched to original keycaps Kits Renders **Note**: Please refer to kit renders for a better depiction of the keyset. I tried my best — 8863 pts · 11 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] DSS Distortion 40s
item.description: Echo by beardgrylls (of the black parade) Description This is the Group buy for the DSS Distortion 40s kit! This set features vibrant pink legends and accents inspired by the aesthetics of early punk rock albums. This set is designed for maximum compatibility with small keyboards, including standard QAZ layouts like the vault. This set will go on sale on April 13th and run until May 15th. MOQ of 50 @ 110 USD Vendors US- SabreKeebs UK- ProtoTypist EU- Keeb.Supply AUS/OCO- Keebz N Cables Renders F1-40 by Geon MB-44 by MelonBred QAZ V4N4GON by Trash Man Designer Discord — 6821 pts · 10 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC] ORI 870  Less, but Better
item.description: The sixth design from ORI CLUB ORI 870 — Design Notes This time around, I spent most of the process refining rather than reinventing—shaping the design language that Ori will carry forward. With the 870, I challenged myself to design with more restraint: something more practical, more daily. But minimalism is never the easier path—when there's nothing left to hide behind, every decision has to stand on its own. In the design process, from the very beginning—even when just thinking about form—I had countless shapes come to mind. I spent the majority of my time narrowing them down, searching for — 12879 pts · 18 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks

item.title: [GB] NicePBT Youmu - CK x Touhou Project - LAST DAY
item.description: Sup, it's 2026 and I'm still at it. This time bringing you an officially licensed Touhou set themed after Konpaku Youmu! The set was designed by myself in collaboration with CannonKeys and manufactured by NicePBT. The inspiration is based on the more modern depiction of Youmu (TH17) with a lighter shade of green (and a slightly bluer hue). Big shoutout to my boy OneCreativeMind/ocm as always for helping with the novelty keycap designs. Shoutout to Starbottle for the 1u/deskmat illustration. https://touhou-project.news/news/16738/ Photo by: keima Kit: GB is now live and ends May 10th. ETA is cu — 5700 pts · 3 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] DCS Grass Valley | Live till June 1st!
item.description: DCS Grass Valley Keycap set inspired by media / film editing keyboards from the '80s and '90s. Designer Discord Group Buy Info: Date: May 1st - June 1st Delivery Estimate: Q3-Q4 2026 Vendors: US: Bowl CA: Minokeys Korea: Geon CN: Typist Club UK: Proto[Typist] SG: ktechs EU: CoffeeKeys Pricing: Planning to do MOQ-based pricing, similar to more recent DCS sets. Base: $149.00 - 50 MOQ $130.00 - 75 MOQ $121.00 - 100 MOQ $113.00 - 150 MOQ Numpad: $49.00 - 25 MOQ $32.00 - 50 MOQ $26.00 - 75MOQ $24.00 - 100 MOQ Spacebars: $21.00 - 25 MOQ $14.00 - 50 MOQ $11.00 - 75MOQ $10.00 - 100 MOQ BAE: $6.50 - 25 — 11999 pts · 14 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [GB] GMK Gregory 2
item.description: GMK Gregory 2 by chamelemon_64 and pancake Greetings Greg Gang. He has returned. Available from May 1st to 29th. Estimated fulfillment date – Q3 2026 Vendors US: NovelKeys UK: Proto[Typist] EU: Oblotzky Industries KR: GEONWORKS CN: KBDfans SG: iLumkb Kits Base – $135, Novelties – $45, Deskpad – $25 Deskpad Dimensions – 836×380mm Renders Photos Special thanks to you, Nephlock, FreshFromTheGrave, and garry. — 9942 pts · 11 comments · Geekhack · Group Buys

item.title: [IC]YuRui HE Switch
item.description: Hello, this is Moyu.studio ﻿ This time, we bring you a lightweight, high-performance magnetic switch - Yurui HE switch Yurui HE switch specification Top Housing: PC Bottom Housing: Nylon Stem: POM Spring: 20mm Total Travel: 3.6±0.2mm Operating Force: 37±2g Bottom-out Force: 42±2g Bottom-out Magnetic Flux: 630±40GS Lubed At the beginning of the design, we aimed to create a high-performance, long-lasting HE switch with a high level of appearance and cost-effectiveness. After trying several springs, we chose to customize this 42g extended spring. The design of the extended spring can make the swi — 1067 pts · 2 comments · Geekhack · Interest Checks
